creator: tobiash@gmail.com
text:
Hi jh - unfortunately the system in question was gutted recently and I can't
go back to test things again. Before I gutted it, I attempted to install
pfsense, which is based on 8.1RC and saw the same misbehavior. I have a
feeling if I tried it with the most recent RC of FreeBSD I would still see
the same error.

Thanks - Tobias
